prd.oneLiner: Connect intake, location and photos, priority, technician assignment, status notices, completion confirmation, and maintenance analysis.
prd.goal: Reduce average first response for urgent facilities requests by 20% and achieve 90% or more SLA-compliant completion.
prd.whyNow: Facilities issues arrive through chat and phone, losing location, severity, and work history and making recurring failures hard to analyze.
prd.problem: Facilities issues arrive through chat and phone, losing location, severity, and work history and making recurring failures hard to analyze.
prd.solution: Connect intake, location and photos, priority, technician assignment, status notices, completion confirmation, and maintenance analysis.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee reporting a facilities issue
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Facilities issues arrive through chat and phone, losing location, severity, and work history and making recurring failures hard to analyze.

targets.name: Facilities operations and maintenance coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Facilities issues arrive through chat and phone, losing location, severity, and work history and making recurring failures hard to analyze.

scenarios.text: Employee reporting a facilities issue completes maintenance issue and repair request submission and checks progress.
Facilities operations and maintenance coordinator reviews failure and sla reporting by facility type and location.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Reduce average first response for urgent facilities requests by 20% and achieve 90% or more SLA-compliant completion.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Maintenance issue and repair request submission
Request state, location, and work-history lookup
Priority triage, technician assignment, and completion verification
Failure and SLA reporting by facility type and location
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
